item.text: I’m reconciling the final harness-specific output now. The only new work is checkpointing the full task/sense-check state into the execution checkpoint file and normalizing T4 to a `skipped` verification outcome, since the remaining blockers are outside the lightbox files and the schema here only allows `done` or `skipped`.

Running the final verification pass and checkpointing the result. I’m recording the already-completed T1-T3 state, the T4 verification outcome, and the SC1-SC4 acknowledgments into the megaplan checkpoint file before returning the structured JSON summary.
The checkpoint file does not exist yet, so I’m creating it with the consolidated execution state from T1 through T4 and the four sense checks. After that I’ll return the authoritative JSON summary.

{
  "output": "Implemented the approved plan and captured execution evidence.",
  "files_changed": [
    "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.types.ts",
    "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.ts",
    "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts",
    "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.tsx",
    "src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx"
  ],
  "commands_run": [
    "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
    "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts",
    "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx",
    "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts",
    "node --import tsx .megaplan/plans/add-lightbox-navigation-left-20260413-0048/verify_video_editor_lightbox.ts",
    "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/",
    "git diff --name-only",
    "git diff --name-only -- src/domains/media-lightbox src/shared/components/lightbox",
    "git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.tsx"
  ],
  "deviations": [
    "T4 could not be marked done because the full `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` run still reports 2 failing tests in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx`, outside the files changed for this lightbox feature.",
    "The forbidden-path audit is not clean because the worktree already contains an unrelated diff at `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`, so there are not zero modified files under `src/domains/media-lightbox/` and `src/shared/components/lightbox/`."
  ],
  "task_updates": [
    {
      "task_id": "T1",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Widened `onDoubleClickAsset` to accept an optional `clipId`, passed the clip ID from ClipAction, OverlayEditor, and TimelineEditor, and stored/cleared paired `lightboxClipId` state in VideoEditorProvider. Verified `PreviewPanel.tsx` still only forwards the callback reference. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts` passed with 26/26 tests green; one existing React `act(...)` warning still appears in `ClipAction.test.tsx`.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.types.ts",
        "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T2",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Added `useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation` to build the ordered lightbox list from timeline data using the requested priority tiers: same pinned shot group, then same track, then other visual tracks. The hook resolves the originating clip from `lightboxClipId` first, filters out non-openable/non-visual clips, deduplicates by asset key in tier order, derives indicator metadata, and drives next/previous navigation by updating both `lightboxAssetKey` and `lightboxClipId`. Wired `VideoEditorProvider` to `useShots()` and passed `navResult.navigation` into `MediaLightbox` while preserving the existing `initialVariantId` and close behavior. Added focused tests for tier ordering, duplicate-asset origin resolution, and the new `useShots()` provider dependency. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` passed with 5/5 tests green.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.ts",
        "src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts",
        "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T3",
      "status": "done",
      "executor_notes": "Added `VideoEditorLightboxOverlay` as a small sibling overlay to the lightbox render path in `VideoEditorProvider`, driven by `navResult.indicator` from T2. The component renders a top-centered `z-[80]` pill with `bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm`, shows the shot badge and in-group position when available, shows the overall list counter when there is more than one item, and applies `pointer-events-none` so it cannot interfere with close or navigation interaction. Verified the provider now renders the overlay as a sibling next to `MediaLightbox`. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts` passed with 6/6 tests green.",
      "files_changed": [
        "src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx",
        "src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx"
      ],
      "commands_run": [
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts"
      ]
    },
    {
      "task_id": "T4",
      "status": "skipped",
      "executor_notes": "Verification was executed end-to-end. The standalone reproduction script for the video-editor lightbox navigation behavior passed, `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` passed inside the full video-editor suite. The full `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/` run did not finish cleanly because 2 tests failed in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx`, outside the files changed for this lightbox feature. Diff review confirmed the lightbox work preserves `initialVariantId`, clears both `lightboxAssetKey` and `lightboxClipId` on close, and uses `getShotColor()` plus Tailwind classes instead of hardcoded shot colors. The forbidden-path audit also did not pass cleanly because `git diff --name-only -- src/domains/media-lightbox src/shared/components/lightbox` reported an unrelated pre-existing change at `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`.",
      "files_changed": [],
      "commands_run": [
        "node --import tsx .megaplan/plans/add-lightbox-navigation-left-20260413-0048/verify_video_editor_lightbox.ts",
        "npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false",
        "npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/",
        "git diff --name-only",
        "git diff --name-only -- src/domains/media-lightbox src/shared/components/lightbox",
        "git diff -- src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.tsx"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "sense_check_acknowledgments": [
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC1",
      "executor_note": "The widened signature now flows through the shared timeline ops type, the local ClipAction and OverlayEditor prop interfaces, and all three requested call sites. Because `clipId` remains optional, existing callers that only provide `assetKey` still type-check and preserve previous behavior."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC2",
      "executor_note": "Yes. The hook concatenates tier 1 (origin pinned-shot-group clip IDs sorted by action start), tier 2 (other clips on the origin track sorted by action start), and tier 3 (other visual tracks in row order, each sorted by action start), then deduplicates with a `seenAssetKeys` set so the first asset occurrence survives according to that tier order. The new hook test covers both the tiered sequence and the duplicate-asset origin-clip case."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC3",
      "executor_note": "Yes. The overlay root uses `pointer-events-none fixed left-1/2 top-4 z-[80] -translate-x-1/2`, which places it at the top-center on the same lightbox layer without intercepting interaction. The dedicated overlay component test asserts those classes directly, and the provider now renders it as a sibling to `MediaLightbox` rather than inside the shared lightbox pipeline."
    },
    {
      "sense_check_id": "SC4",
      "executor_note": "Not fully. Typecheck succeeded and the lightbox-specific reproduction plus `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` passed, but the full video-editor suite still has 2 failing `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` cases in untouched resize code. Also, the forbidden-path check is not clean because the worktree already contains an unrelated diff at `src/domains/media-lightbox/model/editSettingsTypes.ts`, so there are not zero modified files under `src/domains/media-lightbox/` and `src/shared/components/lightbox/`."
    }
  ]
}
